title: Lesson 28 (Vocab) - ららら, るんるん, うるうる...
description: るんるん is a happy humming sound. うるうる is for eyes welling up with tears.

items.gloss: with a rustling sound; rippling (of a stream, etc.); murmuring; purling; slurping down (ochazuke); quickly and easily (e.g. write a letter); with ease; smoothly; fluently; smooth and dry (hair, sand, etc.); silky; powdery (e.g. snow); free-flowing (e.g. blood)
